inputs.label: Young's Modulus (E)
inputs.businessContext: Material modulus of elasticity, e.g., 200000 MPa for steel.

businessContext_i18n.en: Material modulus of elasticity, e.g., 200000 MPa for steel.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Malzeme elastisite modülü, örn. çelik için 200000 MPa.
businessContext_i18n.de: Elastizitätsmodul des Materials, z.B. 200000 MPa für Stahl.

inputs.label: Area Moment of Inertia (I)
inputs.businessContext: Second moment of area of the column cross-section.

businessContext_i18n.en: Second moment of area of the column cross-section.

inputs.label: Effective Length Factor (K)
inputs.businessContext: Depends on end conditions: 1.0 for pinned-pinned, 0.5 for fixed-fixed, etc.

businessContext_i18n.en: Depends on end conditions: 1.0 for pinned-pinned, 0.5 for fixed-fixed, etc.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Uç koşullarına bağlıdır: mafsallı-mafsallı için 1.0, ankastre-ankastre için 0.5, vb.
businessContext_i18n.de: Abhängig von den Endbedingungen: 1,0 für gelenkig-gelenkig, 0,5 für eingespannt-eingespannt, usw.

inputs.label: Cross-sectional Area (A)
inputs.businessContext: Cross-sectional area of the column for stress calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cross-sectional area of the column for stress calculation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gerilme hesabı için kolon kesit alanı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Querschnittsfläche der Säule für die Spannungsberechnung.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
